summary: Multi-page architecture testing for Qloud Smart Homes SEO refactor. Found and fixed critical bug: blog slugs in Blog.jsx didn't match BlogArticle.jsx data keys (5/6 blog links broken). All 8 service pages, 6 blog pages, navigation, and 404 handling now working correctly.

integration_issues.issue: FIXED - Blog slugs in Blog.jsx didn't match blogData keys in BlogArticle.jsx

critical_code_review_comments: Blog slug mismatch was found and fixed - ensure data consistency between list components and detail page components in future
seed_data_creation: None - all data is hardcoded in components
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-page SEO architecture is fully functional. Service pages: 8/8 working. Blog pages: 6/6 working. Navigation, Back to Home links, logo, 404 handling all working. WhatsApp floating button present on homepage. Page titles change correctly for SEO.

tests_executed.header_navigation_links: PASS - All 7 nav items scroll to correct sections
tests_executed.blog_page_routing_6_pages: PASS - All 6 blog URLs accessible (after fix)
tests_executed.blog_card_read_more_links: PASS - All 6 links navigate correctly (after fix)
tests_executed.404_nonexistent_service: PASS - Shows 'Service Not Found' with back link
tests_executed.404_nonexistent_blog: PASS - Shows 'Article Not Found' with back link
tests_executed.page_titles_seo: PASS - Titles change correctly per page

blog_slug_mismatch.issue: Blog.jsx used different slugs than blogData keys in BlogArticle.jsx
blog_slug_mismatch.fix_applied: Updated Blog.jsx slugs to match BlogArticle.jsx data keys
